search_queries: "DDOS attack mitigation strategies for Edge network tier focusing on features like udps.srcdst_unique_ports_count, udps.syn_packet_count, and udps.srcdst_packet_size_variation. Include best practices for handling high traffic volumes and enhancing network resilience."
